BBSPlusCredential.BBSProof","name":"proof","type":"tuple"}],"name":"verifySelectiveDisclosure","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"valid","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"author":"ZeroID Cryptography Team","details":"BBS+ signatures allow a signer to sign a vector of N messages in a single      compact signature. A holder can then derive a zero-knowledge proof of      knowledge of the signature that selectively reveals any subset of the signed      messages without leaking the signature itself or enabling cross-presentation      correlation (unlinkability).      Revocation is handled via an RSA-style cryptographic accumulator rather than      on-chain enumeration, preserving holder privacy: a verifier learns only that      a credential is NOT revoked, not which credential was checked.      Key objects:        - Issuer public key: (w, h0, h[1..N]) where w \u2208 G2, h_i \u2208 G1        - Signature on (m1, ..., mN): (A, e, s) where A \u2208 G1, e, s \u2208 F_r        - Proof of knowledge: (Abar, Aprime, d-values, challenge, responses)      Domain separation tags prevent cross-context replay.","errors":{"AccessControlBadConfirmation()":[{"details":"The caller of a function is not the expected one. NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}."}],"AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount(address,bytes32)":[{"details":"The `account` is missing a role."}],"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is paused."}],"ExpectedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is not paused."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}]},"events":{"Paused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`."},"RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"details":"Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted to signal this."},"RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call. This account bears the admin role (for the granted role). Expected in cases where the role was granted using the internal {AccessControl-_grantRole}."},"RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)"},"Unpaused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"batchVerifyProofs(bytes32,((uint256,uint256),(uint256,uint256),(uint256,uint256),uint256,uint256[],uint256[],uint256[],bytes32,uint256,uint256)[])":{"details":"Uses random linear combination to amortize pairing costs.      If any individual proof is invalid, the entire batch fails.","params":{"issuerId":"The common issuer for all proofs","proofs":"Array of BBS+ proofs to verify"},"returns":{"validCount":"Number of individually valid proofs"}},"getHistoricalRoot(bytes32,uint256)":{"params":{"accumulatorId":"The accumulator","epoch":"The epoch to query"},"returns":{"root":"        The accumulator root at that epoch"}},"getRoleAdmin(bytes32)":{"details":"Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}."},"grantRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"initializeAccumulator(bytes32,bytes32)":{"params":{"accumulatorId":"Unique identifier for the accumulator","initialRoot":"Initial accumulator value (product of primes mod N)"}},"issueBlindedCredential(bytes32,((uint256,uint256),uint256[],uint256[],(uint256,uint256),uint256,uint256[]),((uint256,uint256),uint256,uint256))":{"details":"The holder commits to hidden attributes; the issuer signs over the      commitment without seeing the hidden values.","params":{"issuerId":"Issuer identifier","request":"Blinded credential request with commitment proof","signature":"The BBS+ signature over the combined commitment"},"returns":{"credentialHash":"The unique hash for this blinded credential"}},"issueCredential(bytes32,uint256[],((uint256,uint256),uint256,uint256))":{"details":"The actual signature is computed off-chain by the issuer. This function      validates the signature and stores the credential hash.","params":{"issuerId":"Issuer that signed the credential","messages":"Array of signed messages (field elements)","signature":"The BBS+ signature (A, e, s)"},"returns":{"credentialHash":"The unique hash identifying this credential"}},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"registerIssuerKey(bytes32,(uint256[2],uint256[2]),(uint256,uint256),(uint256,uint256)[],bytes32)":{"params":{"domainTag":"Domain separation tag for credentials under this key","h":"Array of per-message generators in G1 (length = maxMessages)","h0":"Blinding generator in G1","issuerId":"Unique identifier for the issuer","w":"Issuer public key point in G2"}},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeIssuerKey(bytes32)":{"params":{"issuerId":"The issuer to deactivate"}},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas."},"updateAccumulator(bytes32,bytes32,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"The actual accumulator computation happens off-chain. This function      stores the new root and emits an event so holders can update witnesses.","params":{"accumulatorId":"The accumulator to update","newRoot":"New accumulator value after revocations","revokedCount":"Number of credentials revoked in this update","updateProof":"Proof that the transition from old root to new root is valid"}},"verifyNonRevocation(bytes32,((uint256,uint256),uint256,bytes32),bytes)":{"params":{"accumulatorId":"The accumulator to check against","proofData":"ZK proof of non-membership (from the circom circuit)","witness":"The non-revocation witness"},"returns":{"valid":"       True if the credential is confirmed non-revoked"}},"verifySelectiveDisclosure(bytes32,((uint256,uint256),(uint256,uint256),(uint256,uint256),uint256,uint256[],uint256[],uint256[],bytes32,uint256,uint256))":{"details":"This verifies that the prover knows a valid BBS+ signature on a set of      messages, revealing only the messages at revealedIndices. The proof is      unlinkable: two proofs from the same credential cannot be correlated.      Verification equation (simplified):        e(\u0100, g2) == e(A', w)                            ... (1)        \u0100 == A' * (e + challenge)                        ... (2)        D == h0^s2 + \u03a3_{hidden} h_i^m_i                 ... (3)        Schnorr verification of responses against challenge","params":{"issuerId":"The issuer whose key should be used for verification","proof":"The BBS+ proof of knowledge"},"returns":{"valid":"  True if the proof verifies"}}},"title":"BBSPlusCredential","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"batchVerifyProofs(bytes32,((uint256,uint256),(uint256,uint256),(uint256,uint256),uint256,uint256[],uint256[],uint256[],bytes32,uint256,uint256)[])":{"notice":"Batch-verify batchVerifyProofs(bytes32,((uint256,uint.details: Uses random linear combination to amortize pairing costs.      If any individual proof is invalid, the entire batch fails.

params.issuerId: The common issuer for all proofs
params.proofs: Array of BBS+ proofs to verify

returns.root: The accumulator root at that epoch

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

params.initialRoot: Initial accumulator value (product of primes mod N)

issueBlindedCredential(bytes32,((uint256.details: The holder commits to hidden attributes; the issuer signs over the      commitment without seeing the hidden values.

params.request: Blinded credential request with commitment proof
params.signature: The BBS+ signature over the combined commitment

returns.credentialHash: The unique hash for this blinded credential

issueCredential(bytes32,uint256[],((uint.details: The actual signature is computed off-chain by the issuer. This function      validates the signature and stores the credential hash.

returns.credentialHash: The unique hash identifying this credential

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

params.domainTag: Domain separation tag for credentials under this key
params.h: Array of per-message generators in G1 (length = maxMessages)
params.w: Issuer public key point in G2

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

updateAccumulator(bytes32,bytes32,uint25.details: The actual accumulator computation happens off-chain. This function      stores the new root and emits an event so holders can update witnesses.

params.revokedCount: Number of credentials revoked in this update
params.updateProof: Proof that the transition from old root to new root is valid

params.proofData: ZK proof of non-membership (from the circom circuit)

returns.valid: True if the credential is confirmed non-revoked

verifySelectiveDisclosure(bytes32,((uint.details: This verifies that the prover knows a valid BBS+ signature on a set of      messages, revealing only the messages at revealedIndices. The proof is      unlinkable: two proofs from the same credential cannot be correlated.      Verification equation (simplified):        e(Ā, g2) == e(A', w)                            ... (1)        Ā == A' * (e + challenge)                        ... (2)        D == h0^s2 + Σ_{hidden} h_i^m_i                 ... (3)        Schnorr verification of responses against challenge

params.issuerId: The issuer whose key should be used for verification

batchVerifyProofs(bytes32,((uint256,uint.notice: Batch-verify multiple BBS+ proofs in a single transaction.

getHistoricalRoot(bytes32,uint256).notice: Check the accumulator root at a historical epoch (point-in-time check).

initializeAccumulator(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Initialize a new cryptographic accumulator for revocation.

isCredentialIssued(bytes32).notice: Check if a credential has been issued

isDomainRegistered(bytes32).notice: Check if a domain tag is registered

issueBlindedCredential(bytes32,((uint256.notice: Issue a credential from a blinded request (blind issuance).

issueCredential(bytes32,uint256[],((uint.notice: Record a BBS+ credential issuance on-chain.

registerIssuerKey(bytes32,(uint256[2],ui.notice: Register a new BBS+ issuer public key.

revokeIssuerKey(bytes32).notice: Revoke an issuer's public key (credentials remain valid but         no new credentials can reference this key).

updateAccumulator(bytes32,bytes32,uint25.notice: Update the accumulator state after revoking one or more credentials.

verifyNonRevocation(bytes32,((uint256,ui.notice: Verify a non-revocation witness against the current accumulator state.

verifySelectiveDisclosure(bytes32,((uint.notice: Verify a BBS+ proof of knowledge with selective disclosure.
